cinematography.prompt: You are a cinematographer analyzing the VISUAL STYLE of this single video frame — ignore the specific subject/content. In 2–3 concise sentences, cover: shot type & framing (wide/medium/close; centered vs rule-of-thirds; negative space); camera/lens feel (depth of field, angle, any motion implied); lighting (high/low key, direction, mood); color & grade (palette, warm/cool, saturation, contrast); and any on-screen graphics or text (lower-thirds, titles, captions, callouts, data viz). Be concrete; describe style, not story.

reads.read: This medium close-up utilizes a rule-of-thirds composition, balancing the subject against bold, textured gold calligraphy and an ornate geometric border. The low-key lighting creates a dramatic chiaroscuro effect with a sharp side-key, complemented by a moody, desaturated color grade of deep crimsons and heavy shadows. A shallow depth of field isolates the subject from the dark background, emphasizing a high-contrast, cinematic period-drama aesthetic.

This medium shot utilizes a shallow depth of field and an over-the-shoulder perspective to create a layered, intimate composition that focuses on the figures in the middle ground. The lighting is dramatic and low-key, featuring a warm, upward-directed source that creates sharp chiaroscuro highlights against a desaturated palette of deep shadows and cool, nocturnal background tones. A subtle, stylized text watermark is positioned in the bottom-right corner, while the high-contrast grade emphasizes a gritty, cinematic texture.

This medium shot utilizes a rule-of-thirds composition, positioning the subject on the right to leave significant negative space for a blurred background captured with a shallow depth of field. The low-key lighting creates a high-contrast, dual-tone grade, pitting a warm orange directional light from the right against desaturated, cool-blue shadows for a moody, cinematic feel. A subtle text watermark is visible in the bottom-right corner, while the overall frame remains static and painterly.

This medium-wide, over-the-shoulder shot utilizes a low-key lighting setup with dramatic, directional shafts of light from the right to create high-contrast highlights and deep, atmospheric shadows. The eye-level camera employs a moderate depth of field that isolates the mid-ground subjects against a dense, slightly blurred background of figures. The color grade features a desaturated, earthy palette of deep reds and blacks with warm highlights, accented only by a subtle, faint watermark in the bottom-right corner.
